en: It was deafening, but it was wonderful.
They're becoming a part of our show. I want to encourage that, so I've got an idea to involve them a little bit more.
ko: 그들이 우리 쇼의 일부가 되고 있어. 그걸 격려하고 싶어.

en: Now, I want you to clap on the third beat.
ko: 이제 세 번째 비트에 박수를 쳐.

en: Don't speed up. Rog, keep that time.
No printer. It's unusual to see you without your clone.
ko: 너의 클론 없이 너를 보는 건 드물어.

en: It's unusual seeing you be so bitchy.
Ah, you kept time, Rog. Good. What's going on?
You'd know if you were on time. I'm a performer, darling, not a Swiss train conductor.
